markdown.markdown:
## Master of Science in Business Analytics
**University of California, San Diego - Rady School of Management**
*July 2025 – December 2026*

**Relevant coursework**
- MGTA 455 - Customer Analytics & AI (Generative AI, Python, Cases on Customer Targeting, Statistical Modeling - Neural Networks, Logisistic Regression)
- MGTA 453 - Business Analytics (Python, Linear Regression, Hypothesis Testing, Decision Analysis)
- MGTA 452 - Collecting & Analyzing Large Data (Python, Automating Reporting & Using Quarto, Loading files, web scraping, API Calls, Regression)
- MGTA 444 - Business Analytics Consulting
- MGTA 466 - Scalable Analytics
- MGTA 464 - SQL & ETL
- MGTA 451 - Analytics in Marketing, Finance, & Operations

### **Projects**

#### Capstone Project
Local Media San Diego - Data Integration & Centralization

#### Interactive California Crime Data Dashboard
Github Hosted Crime Analysis Interactive Web Dashboard. Final Project for MGTA 452 Class (Collecting/Analyzing Lrg Data)
[View Project Repo](https://github.com/rsm-fluan/california-crime-dashboard) | [Web Dashbord](https://rsm-fluan.github.io/california-crime-dashboard/)


#### Snowflake ETL Project
Engineered an ETL Pipeline using SQL & Python to create databases, schema, and tables using purchas order and invoice data. MGTA 464 Class (SQL & ETL)

---

## Bachelor of Art in Interdisciplinary Studies
**San Diego State University**
*2019–2022*

**Disciplines**
Management Information Systems, Psychology, Finance

**Relevant coursework**
- MIS: Systems Analysis, Data Management Systems, SAP ERP & SAP Analytics Cloud,
- Finance: International Finance, Investments, Real Estate Finance
- Psychology: Developmental Psychology, Neuroscience

### **Selected projects**

#### Business Consulting Project
Proposed an outsourced supply chain system to Pura Vida using gap analysis, SDLC, and data flow diagrams.

#### Data Ordering System
Created and analyzed database using SQL and created a dashboard using Python.

---

## Business Intelligence Analyst Professional Certificate
**UC San Diego Extended Studies*
*01/2025-06/2025*

**Relevant coursework**
* Data Visualization & Business Intelligence (Tableau)
* Coding in R
* Advanced Excel
* SQL
